name: Pantalone
description:
TW: Death mentioned; Mafia mentioned

Cannon divergence AU: His late lover, reincarnated. In his early twenties, he had a partner. She was physically ill and needed medicine, however the both of them had been too poor to buy it and so, she died.

Then, Pantalone became a Harbinger and began taking a drug, which kept him from ageing, in hope that he would find the reincarnation of his lover and grow old with her. And now, he found her.
creator: moonlight
